title: Langtang Gosaikunda Lake Trek – 7 Days Sacred Himalayan Journey
description:
The Langtang Gosaikunda Lake Trek is a perfect blend of spiritual significance, alpine adventure, and raw Himalayan beauty. This 7-day journey takes you from the vibrant streets of Kathmandu to the sacred high-altitude lakes of Gosaikunda (4,380m), revered by both Hindus and Buddhists.

Starting with a scenic drive to Dhunche, the trek gradually ascends through lush pine forests, Tamang villages, cascading waterfalls, and dramatic mountain landscapes. Along the trail, you’ll experience the warm hospitality of local communities, explore ancient monasteries like Sing Gompa (Chandanbari), and witness breathtaking views of Langtang Lirung, Ganesh Himal, Manaslu, and surrounding peaks.

The highlight of the trek is the arrival at Gosaikunda Lake, a sacred alpine lake believed to have been created by Lord Shiva. Surrounded by rugged Himalayan terrain and serene glacial waters, the area offers a deeply peaceful and spiritual experience. The return journey follows the same scenic route back to Dhunche before driving to Kathmandu, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Nepal’s natural and cultural richness.

This trek is ideal for adventure seekers, spiritual travelers, and nature lovers looking for a moderate Himalayan trek with deep cultural meaning.
best_time: March, April, May, September, October, November
highlights: Visit the sacred alpine lakes of Gosaikunda (4,380m), revered by Hindus and Buddhists
Scenic drive through the Trishuli River valley and traditional hill villages
Trek through pine, rhododendron, and alpine forests
Experience Tamang culture and Tibetan-influenced mountain lifestyle
Explore Sing Gompa (Chandanbari Monastery) and famous yak cheese factory
Comfortable stays in teahouses and a 3-star hotel in Kathmandu
Moderate trek suitable for both adventure seekers and spiritual travelers
inclusions: Airport pickup and drop-off by private vehicle
2 nights accommodation in a 3-star hotel in Thamel (bed & breakfast)
All ground transportation as per itinerary (Kathmandu–Dhunche–Kathmandu)
Accommodation in well-maintained teahouses/lodges during trekking days
Trekking permits and necessary government taxes
exclusions: Travel and personal insurance (mandatory for trekking)
Hot showers, Wi-Fi, charging, and bottled drinks during the trek
Extra accommodation or meals due to early arrival or late departure
Any costs arising from unforeseen circumstances (weather, landslides, flight delays)

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu (1,400m)
itinerary.description: Upon arrival at Tribhuvan International Airport, our representative will warmly welcome you and transfer you to your hotel. After check-in, you can relax or explore nearby streets filled with cafes, shops, and cultural landmarks.

itinerary.title: Drive from Kathmandu to Dhunche (1,960m)
itinerary.description:
After breakfast, you’ll drive to Dhunche, the gateway to Langtang National Park. The scenic journey passes through terraced farmlands, forests, rivers, and rural settlements along the Trishuli River. Upon arrival, explore the village and interact with local Tamang people.

Drive Duration: 5–6 hours

itinerary.title: Trek from Dhunche to Chandanbari (Sing Gompa) – 3,330m
itinerary.description:
Today’s trek begins with a gradual ascent through pine forests and scenic trails. Passing through Ghatte Khola and Deurali, you’ll enjoy peaceful surroundings and fresh mountain air. Chandanbari, also known as Sing Gompa, is famous for its monastery and yak cheese factory.

Trek Duration: 5–6 hours

itinerary.title: Trek from Chandanbari to Gosaikunda (4,380m)
itinerary.description:
This is the most rewarding day of the trek. The trail ascends through rugged terrain with breathtaking views of Himalayan peaks. Along the way, you’ll pass Cholangpati, Lauribina, and the sacred Bhairav Kunda and Saraswati Kunda before reaching Gosaikunda Lake. Spend time exploring the surrounding lakes and soaking in the spiritual atmosphere.

Trek Duration: 5–6 hours

itinerary.title: Trek from Gosaikunda to Dhunche
itinerary.description:
After sunrise views over Gosaikunda, you’ll begin your descent back to Dhunche via Lauribina and Chandanbari. The downhill trek offers a different perspective of the landscapes and increases chances of spotting wildlife such as Himalayan birds and, if lucky, the rare red panda.

Trek Duration: 7–8 hours

itinerary.title: Drive from Dhunche to Kathmandu
itinerary.description:
Following breakfast, you’ll drive back to Kathmandu, enjoying scenic views of hills, rivers, and countryside along the way. Upon arrival, check in to your hotel and enjoy a free evening for shopping or relaxation.

Drive Duration: 5–6 hours

itinerary.title: Final Departure
itinerary.description: Our team will transfer you to the airport for your onward journey. If you wish to extend your stay or add other tours, we’ll be happy to arrange it for you.
